observation: I can see the sign-up form with the email field already filled in with 'ai.test.user@example.com'. There's a red 'Sign up' button (element 63) that I can click to proceed with the registration. This appears to be the main call-to-action button for completing the email sign-up process.
reasoning: As a normal user who has already entered their email address, the logical next step is to click the 'Sign up' button to submit the form and proceed with the registration. This is the primary action button for email registration.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The sign-up button changed from displaying 'Sign up' text to showing only a white circular loading indicator/spinner. However, the UI remains on the same sign-up page without progressing to the next step in the flow.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: The sign-up button shows loading state but fails to navigate to the next screen or complete the registration process. This could be due to backend service unavailability, network connectivity issues, form validation errors not being displayed, or a frontend routing/navigation bug.
